channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Supermercados BM apuesta por la digitalización de su cadena de suministro gracias a la IA
item.description: La transformación digital de cualquier negocio, independientemente de su sector de actividad, es clave para su supervivencia.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Streamlining IT operations with single-stack networking
item.description: As IT environments become increasingly complex, visibility is keynote in secure and efficient IT operations.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Rings of Power season 2 ending explained: who dies, The Stranger's name revealed, will there be a season 3, and more big questions answered
item.description: TechRadar and The Rings of Power cast are here to provide answers to your biggest queries about season 2's final episode.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Spider lovers scurry to Colorado town in search of mating tarantulas and community
item.description: It’s tarantula mating season on the Colorado plains, when male spiders scurry out of their burrows in search of a mate.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Peipert And Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: L’economia digitale di fronte alla sfida della regolamentazione
item.description: Questo è forse uno dei dibattiti più frequenti quando si parla di legislazione in materia digitale: l’onere normativo ostacola l’innovazione? E, di conseguenza, fino a che punto è necessario regolamentare per creare un quadro solido, ma che faciliti le nuove proposte? L’eterno dilemma contrappone te
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta and Australia have partnered to crack down on ‘celeb bait’ scam ads
item.description: Meta said it has taken down some 8,000 so-called “celeb bait” scam ads from Facebook and Instagram as part of a new effort with Australian banks to curb the practice.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: The VP debate was a return to the politics of yesteryear—except on Truth Social
item.description: Minutes before the start of the debate vice presidential debate, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump made a commitment of nonpartisanship. “We’re going to keep it very straight, see how they do,” he said in a video posted to Truth Social, the social platform he owns.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: ChatGPT maker OpenAI raises $6.6 billion in fresh funding as it moves away from its nonprofit roots
item.description: OpenAI says it has raised $6.6 billion in venture capital investments as part of a broader shift by the ChatGPT maker away from its nonprofit roots.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bank of America is having service issues and account access problems: Downdetector
item.description: A message on the Bank of America app states, “Accounts Temporarily Unavailable. Some accounts and/or balances are temporarily unavailable.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, NewsNation

item.title: How these Grindr competitors are trying to beat the dating app at its own game
item.description: Grindr might not have been the first location-based dating app—that distinction belongs to MeetMoi, a hookup app acquired by Match Group in 2016. But whether LGBT or not, looking for a long-term relationship or not, most singles are living in the house that Grindr built.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Musk sending Starlink terminals to storm-ravaged North Carolina
item.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said Tuesday the aerospace company is sending more Starlink terminals to North Carolina following the widespread devastation of Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 3 things to get right with data management for gen AI projects
item.description: According to Kari Briski, VP of AI models, software, and services at Nvidia, successfully implementing gen AI hinges on effective data management and evaluating how different models work together to serve a specific use case.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft Closes Doors on HoloLens 2, Signaling Shift in Augmented Reality Strategy
item.description: Microsoft ceases production of HoloLens 2, ending support in 2027. The move signals a shift in the company's augmented reality strategy, with a focus on software solutions and partnerships.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PyTorch library makes models faster and smaller
item.description: The PyTorch Foundation, makers of the PyTorch machine learning framework, has launched torchao, a PyTorch native library that makes models faster and smaller by leveraging low-bit dtypes, sparsity, and quantization.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The 2024 election is razor close. TikTok creators could tip it
item.description: If Barack Obama’s digital journey to the White House in 2008 marked the Facebook election, and Donald Trump’s social media presence in 2016 made that race the Twitter election, then 2024 seems likely to be remembered as the TikTok election.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Arkansas sues YouTube over claims that the site is fueling a mental health crisis
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — Arkansas sued YouTube and parent company Alphabet on Monday, saying the video-sharing platform is made deliberately addictive and fueling a mental health crisis among youth in the state.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fortnite Maker Epic Games Accuses Google and Samsung of Anticompetitive Conduct
item.description: Epic Games sues Google and Samsung, alleging antitrust law violations through Samsung's Auto Blocker feature.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Think twice before using public computers: Here's why
item.description: Using public computers poses security risks, tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says, so take precautions or use your own secure device.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California governor vetoes bill to create first-in-nation AI safety measures
item.description: The decision is a blow to efforts attempting to rein in the industry that is rapidly evolving with little oversight.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump posts, then deletes, fake image of Kamala Harris with Diddy
item.description: The man in the real image taken in 2001 is talk show host Montel Williams, whom Harris dated at that time.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Brazil judge makes new requests to allow X to be reinstated from suspension
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes on Friday added conditions for Elon Musk’s X to have its service reestablished in the country, one day after the social media platform said it had complied with all the judge’s demands, including naming a legal representative.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: X requests it be reinstated in Brazil after complying with judge's orders, sources say
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — In the high-stakes showdown between the world’s richest man and a Brazilian Supreme Court justice, Elon Musk blinked. Musk’s social media site X has complied with Alexandre de Moraes’ orders and requested its service be reestablished in the country, two sources said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The UK's AI Data Center Boom: Blackstone Invests $13.3 Billion in Europe's Largest Facility
item.description: Blackstone invests $13.3 billion to build a massive AI data center in Northumberland, UK, enhancing the country's AI infrastructure and positioning it as a hub for tech development in Europe.
item.dc:creator: Network World
